name: David Robertson
title: AI Architect | AI Systems Engineer | AI Product Builder
profile: AI architect and product builder specialising in designing and delivering production AI systems that move from concept to deployment with minimal overhead. Focused on execution-first AI - building systems that automate workflows, orchestrate multi-step processes, and integrate directly into products to deliver measurable outcomes. Strong bias towards shipping real systems rather than prototypes.

experience.summary: Designing and delivering production AI systems focused on execution, automation, and real workflow impact.
responsibilities: Designed and deployed AI systems that execute full workflows from input through to structured output without manual intervention
Architected multi-step agent pipelines capable of task planning, execution, and output validation
Built AI-powered SaaS platforms for CV optimisation, job matching, and recruitment workflows
Developed MCP-based structured data systems enabling AI interaction with external job platforms
Designed deterministic scoring systems for candidate-job fit evaluation
Implemented credit-based AI usage models for transparent scaling and cost control
Built production backend systems on VPS/Linux with persistent execution services
Delivered systems under tight time constraints (often within days) with production readiness

experience.summary: Building AI-driven SaaS platforms across education and recruitment verticals.
responsibilities: Designed AI document generation systems for structured writing workflows
Built deterministic job matching and ranking engines with explainable scoring
Architected shared SaaS data layers across multiple AI products
Developed reusable architecture patterns enabling rapid MVP deployment
Built structured ingestion pipelines converting unstructured data into usable formats
Integrated AI capabilities directly into product features rather than standalone tools

experience.summary: Built one of the earliest EdTech search and discovery platforms.
responsibilities: Designed structured search and discovery systems before modern search engines matured
Built data ingestion and categorisation pipelines for educational content
Delivered a functional early-stage EdTech platform with real user utility
Led both technical development and commercial direction

experience.summary: Delivered full-stack web development across multiple client projects.
responsibilities: Built and maintained web platforms across a range of industries
Established strong foundations in frontend and backend architecture
Focused on usability, maintainability, and scalable design patterns

experience.summary: Held senior operational roles in high-pressure commercial environments.
responsibilities: Managed large-scale operations and delivery environments
Developed strong stakeholder management and execution skills
Delivered consistent performance under time and operational constraints

key_systems: AI job matching and ranking engine with deterministic scoring
MCP-based job data server for structured AI interaction
AI CV optimisation and document generation system
Autonomous job search and ingestion pipeline
AI interview simulation and evaluation system

projects.name: AI Jobs Pipeline
projects.description: Automated system that scans multiple UK job sources daily, scores roles against profile fit, and publishes structured reports.

projects.name: InterviewsAI
projects.description: AI-driven interview system with multi-step evaluation, transcription, scoring, and adaptive questioning.

achievements.title: Selected for EIE14
achievements.description: Selected for the EIE14 programme run by Informatics Ventures, now part of The Bayes Centre, University of Edinburgh

achievements.title: Selected for EIE22
achievements.description: Selected for the EIE22 programme run by Informatics Ventures, now part of The Bayes Centre, University of Edinburgh

achievements.title: The Pitch UK Digital Marketing Award Winner
Top-ranked Marketing GPT
achievements.description: Custom GPT ranked #1 on Google for 'Marketing GPT'

full_time_preferences.flexibility: May consider lower salary depending on working hours, scope, and overall employment terms

engagement_preferences.focus: High-impact work where speed, clarity, and delivery matter. Open to both contract and permanent roles where AI is central to the product or business.
